interaction_phrase: has joined OQC's $100m Series B funding round
occurrence_sentence: PRESS RELEASE — OQC, a global leader in quantum computing-as-a-service (QCaaS), today announced that Chevron Technology Ventures, part of Chevron Corporation (CVX: NYSE), has joined its $100m Series B funding round.
